title: A TACTICAL MASTERCLASS! 2026 F1 Barcelona Catalunya GP RACE Analysis
description:
A TACTICAL MASTERCLASS! 2026 F1 Barcelona Catalunya GP RACE Analysis.

Hamilton delivers a strategic masterclass in Barcelona, using an aggressive 3-stop race to overcome Mercedes' 2-stop approach and take victory. While Mercedes focused on track position, Hamilton consistently exploited the grip advantage of fresher tyres, turning the race into a tyre-life battle rather than a pure pace contest.

Further back, one of the most interesting technical moments came from Kimi Antonelli's pass on Geor

title: RUSSELL ON POLE! 2026 F1 Barcelona Catalunya GP QUALIFYING Analysis (Spain)
description:
RUSSELL STORMS TO POLE! 2026 F1 Barcelona Catalunya GP QUALIFYING Analysis (Spain).

George Russell delivers a stunning pole position lap in Barcelona, edging out teammate Lewis Hamilton as Mercedes lock out the front row. Kimi Antonelli continues to impress with P3, putting three Silver Arrows-powered cars at the sharp end heading into Sunday's race.

Meanwhile, Ferrari's day unravelled when Charles Leclerc crashed at Turn 4 after turning in too early and clipping the inside kerb, ending his qu

title: Hamilton’s Speed Surge Explained — Ferrari’s Barcelona Upgrade Exposed
description:
Lewis Hamilton's remarkable Ferrari resurgence continues to gather momentum as the Scuderia arrives in Barcelona with its biggest upgrade package of the 2026 Formula 1 season.

After securing multiple podiums and climbing to second in the championship standings, Hamilton heads into the Spanish Grand Prix with growing confidence and a Ferrari team determined to close the gap to Mercedes. With a new front wing, updated floor, and key aerodynamic developments, Barcelona could become the most import

title: 2026 F1 Monaco GP race analysis by Peter Windsor
description: Although Max Verstappen's qualifying brilliance on Sunday came to nought - came to a dead stop on the grid, just after lights-out - there was still a Monaco GP to be run. There were penalties aplenty; there were Safety Cars; there was a standing re-start; and drivers like Ferrari's Charles Leclerc hit the barriers. Through it all, though, from the front, from the pole and with fastest lap to his credit, Kimi Antonelli, 19, the Mercedes driver, won the Monaco GP.  Sir Lewis Hamilton finished a va

title: ANTONELLI SNATCHES POLE! 2026 Monaco F1 QUALIFYING Analysis!
description:
ANTONELLI SNATCHES POLE! 2026 Monaco F1 QUALIFYING Analysis!

KIMI ANTONELLI DOES IT AGAIN.

When it mattered most in Q3, Antonelli found the lap and ripped pole position away from Verstappen by just 0.043s around the streets of Monaco. A circuit where commitment, precision and confidence are everything.

Ferrari looked like favourites after Friday, Verstappen looked threatening throughout qualifying, but when the pressure peaked, it was Antonelli who delivered.

title: 2026 F1 Monaco GP Friday Practice Analysis.
description:
2026 F1 Monaco GP Friday Practice Analysis.

Ferrari set the pace on Friday in Monaco, topping both FP1 and FP2, but the biggest story may have been the number of drivers flirting with the limits of the circuit.

Monaco is the ultimate test of the Street Circuit Rule: build confidence progressively, understand where the walls are, and leave yourself enough margin to finish the session. The track doesn't reward bravery nearly as much as it punishes mistakes.

title: Machine Learning Metrics Explained | Accuracy, Precision, Recall & F1 Score
description:
How do you know if a machine learning model is actually good?

In this lecture, we break down the most important model evaluation metrics used in machine learning and data mining:

✅ Confusion Matrix
✅ Accuracy and Error Rate
✅ Class Imbalance Problems
✅ Sensitivity (Recall) and Specificity
✅ Precision vs Recall
✅ F1 Score and F-Measure
✅ Real-World Cancer Diagnosis Example

title: 2026 F1 Canadian GP RACE Analysis
description:
2026 F1 Canadian GP RACE Analysis

Canada 2026 delivered absolute heartbreak for George Russell.

Mercedes had the pace, George looked in control, and another huge result was on the table… until the car let go. Mechanical failure ends his race in brutal fashion after what looked like a genuine shot at victory.

But there was another story unfolding before the blow-up: the front tyre battle.
